themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 11 verses. Commentary leans on "Faithful is he that calleth you, who also will do it — pistos ho kalōn hymas, hos kai poiēsei...". Word-study detail reinforces "πιστὸς: Faithful - objectively, trustworthy; subjectively, trustful".
